name: Picante Turkey Pie
recipeInstructions:
Many thanks to Mary Jane Womack of Merced, California,
for this delicious one-dish dinner. A real family
pleaser, the ground turkey "crust" is filled with
pizza-flavored vegetables and cheese.
Combine turkey, crumbs, 1/4 cup of the Pace Picante
Sauce, 1/4 teaspoon of the oregano, and 2 cloves garlic
in a medium bowl; mix well. Press onto bottom and sides
of 9-inch pie plate. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
While the shell is baking, cook vegetables and remaining
garlic in oil in a 10-inch skillet for 5 minutes,
stirring occasionally. Stir in remaining 3/4 cup Pace
Picante Sauce, tomato paste, olives, and remaining 3/4
teaspoon oregano. Simmer for 5 minutes or until thickened.
Stir in Parmesan cheese; spoon into baked shell. Top with
mozzarella cheese; return to oven for 10 minutes or until
cheese is melted. Serve with additional Pace Picante Sauce.
